nodes.name: sciona.institutional_quant_engine.fractional_diff
nodes.conceptual_summary: Grouped atoms sharing an upstream family or module.
nodes.decomposition_rationale: Replaces singleton atom subpackages with a flat module layout.

nodes.name: fractional_differentiator
nodes.description: Computes the fractional differentiation of a time series. It first calculates the necessary weights based on the differentiation order 'd' and then applies them to the series, dropping terms below a specified threshold.

inputs.name: threshold
inputs.constraints: Positive cutoff for retaining binomial weights.

outputs.name: result
outputs.constraints: Fractionally differenced series after dropping initial incomplete windows.

nodes.type_signature: (series: pd.Series, d: float, threshold: float) -> pd.Series
nodes.conceptual_summary: Direct callable atom in the consolidated module.
nodes.critic_notes: Signature derived from the Python wrapper definition.
